name: Feature Mode Execution
description: Implements multi-iteration agent execution where Claude loops through plan/execute/evaluate phases. Manages phase transitions, continuation prompts, team spawning, early termination, and progress tracking.

Managers/CompletionAnalyzer.cs.content:
class CompletionAnalyzer : ICompletionAnalyzer
  L55: IsTaskOutputComplete(string[] lines, int recommendationLine) -> bool
  L89: ExtractRecommendations(string output) -> string?
  L168: VerifyResultAsync(string outputTail, string taskDescription, string? completionSummary, CancellationToken ct = default, string? modelOverride = null) -> Task<ResultVerification?>
  L307: FormatCompletionSummary(AgentTaskStatus status, TimeSpan duration, List<(string name, int added, int removed) -> string
  L318: GenerateCompletionSummaryAsync(string projectPath, string? gitStartHash, AgentTaskStatus status, TimeSpan duration, long inputTokens = 0, long outputTokens = 0, long cacheReadTokens = 0, long cacheCreationTokens = 0, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default) -> Task<string>
  L342: CheckFeatureModeComplete(string output) -> bool
  L355: IsTokenLimitError(string output) -> bool

Managers/EarlyTerminationManager.cs.content:
class EarlyTerminationManager
  ClearTaskState(string taskId) -> void
  GetStatistics() -> TerminationStatistics
class TerminationState
  TaskId: string
  LastEvaluation: DateTime
  ConsecutiveStallIterations: int
  RecentErrorCounts: List<int>
class TerminationCheck
  Type: TerminationCheckType
  Severity: CheckSeverity
  Description: string
  Evidence: List<string>
enum TerminationCheckType
    Stalled, LowVelocity, BudgetExceeded, BudgetWarning, IterationLimit, CatastrophicError
enum CheckSeverity
    Info, Warning
class TerminationDecision
  TaskId: string
  Iteration: int

Managers/FeatureModeHandler.cs.content:
class FeatureModeHandler
  Description: string
  DependsOn: List<int>?
enum FeatureModeAction
    newFailures, Action, ConsecutiveFailures, TrimOutput

Managers/ProgressAnalyzer.cs.content:
class ProgressAnalyzer
  RecordProgress(string taskId, TaskProgressMetrics metrics) -> void
  ExtractMetricsFromOutput(string taskId, string output, int iteration) -> TaskProgressMetrics
  DetectStall(string taskId) -> StallDetectionResult
  CalculateVelocity(string taskId) -> VelocityAnalysis
  ClearTaskHistory(string taskId) -> void
class StallDetectionResult
  IsStalled: bool
  Conditions: List<StallCondition>
  Recommendation: string
  ConfidenceScore: double
class VelocityAnalysis
  HasSufficientData: bool
  AverageVelocity: double
  VelocityTrend: VelocityTrend
  EstimatedIterationsRemaining: int
enum VelocityTrend
    Accelerating, Stable

patterns: Crash-loop detection via consecutive failure count
Token limit retry with context trimming
